# Mermaid Design Code

> Design code standard for interactive Mermaid diagrams in HTML. Pastel palette, dark/light theme, zoom/pan, paired description files.

## About

Mermaid Design Code is a set of rules, tokens, and examples for creating consistent Mermaid diagrams in HTML. Covers typography (Sora 700 + Lato 400/700), pastel classDef palette, dark/light theme with localStorage, zoom/pan controls, and file naming conventions. Every diagram is a pair: an interactive `.html` and a `-description.md` walkthrough.

- Author: [Max Osovsky](https://www.linkedin.com/in/osovsky/)
- URL: https://maximosovsky.github.io/mermaid-design-code/
- License: MIT

## Docs

- [Full documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/maximosovsky/mermaid-design-code/main/llms-full.txt): Complete guidelines, color palette, and checklist
- [Guidelines](https://github.com/maximosovsky/mermaid-design-code/blob/main/mermaid-guidelines.md): Full design code standard
- [Example](https://maximosovsky.github.io/mermaid-design-code/examples/project-flow-2026-03-11.html): Live diagram
